title: ornithogalum umbellatum var. angustifolium
intro: Ornithogalum umbellatum var. angustifolium, also known as the narrow-leaved star of Bethlehem, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asparagaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of this plant include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Ornithogalum umbellatum var. angustifolium can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction to be used in herbal remedies.
